title: The Tulip.
content:
She slept beneath a tree
    Remembered but by me.
    I touched her cradle mute;
    She recognized the foot,
    Put on her carmine suit, --
    And see!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Tulip."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
